types.name: YYYYMMDD
types.description: Branded type for MoneyWorks date format (YYYYMMDD). Ensures type safety when working with date strings.

examples.title: Type usage

types.name: YYYYMMDDWithMethods
types.description: Extended YYYYMMDD type with fluent methods for date operations. Created by the `d` tagged template.

methods.name: gt
methods.description: Check if date is greater than another

methods.name: gte
methods.description: Check if date is greater than or equal to another

methods.name: lt
methods.description: Check if date is less than another

methods.name: lte
methods.description: Check if date is less than or equal to another

methods.name: isLeapYear
methods.description: Check if year is leap year

examples.title: Fluent API usage

types.name: Period
types.description: Branded type for MoneyWorks period format (YYYYMM as number). Represents a month/year combination.

examples.title: Period usage

types.name: HHMMSS
types.description: Branded type for MoneyWorks time format (HHMMSS). Represents time as a 6-digit string.

examples.title: Time type usage

types.name: AccountCode
types.description: Branded type for MoneyWorks account codes. Ensures type safety when working with account references.

examples.title: Account code usage

types.name: NameCode
types.description: Branded type for MoneyWorks name (customer/supplier) codes

examples.title: Name code usage
examples.code:
const customer: NameCode = "CUST001" as NameCode;
const supplier: NameCode = "SUPP001" as NameCode;

types.name: ProductCode
types.description: Branded type for MoneyWorks product/item codes

examples.title: Product code usage

types.name: TransactionSeq
types.description: Branded type for MoneyWorks transaction sequence numbers

examples.title: Transaction sequence usage

types.name: Brand
types.signature: type Brand<T, B> = T & { readonly __brand: B }
types.description: Utility type for creating branded types. Adds a phantom brand property to distinguish otherwise identical types.

examples.title: Creating custom branded types

types.name: MoneyWorksParseOptions
types.description: Options for JSON parsing with MoneyWorks type conversion

properties.name: convertPeriods
properties.description: Convert period fields to Period type

properties.name: additionalDateFields
properties.description: Additional field names to treat as dates

properties.name: excludeFields
properties.description: Field names to exclude from conversion

properties.name: strict
properties.description: Throw on invalid values instead of keeping original

examples.title: Customizing parsing

types.name: MoneyWorksStringifyOptions
types.description: Options for JSON stringification with formatting

properties.name: dateSeparator
properties.description: Date separator when formatDates is true

properties.name: periodSeparator
properties.description: Period separator when formatPeriods is true

examples.title: Formatting options

namespaces.name: YYYYMMDDUtils
namespaces.description: Utility namespace for YYYYMMDD date operations. Provides functions for validation, creation, arithmetic, formatting, and comparisons.

functions.name: isValid
functions.description: Check if string is valid YYYYMMDD format

functions.name: tryCreate
functions.description: Safe creation, returns null on invalid

functions.name: isLeapYear
functions.description: Check if year is leap year

examples.title: Using YYYYMMDDUtils namespace

namespaces.name: PeriodUtils
namespaces.description: Utility namespace for Period operations. Handles YYYYMM format periods with validation, arithmetic, and conversions.

functions.name: isValid
functions.description: Check if number is valid Period

functions.name: tryCreate
functions.description: Safe creation, returns null on invalid

examples.title: Using PeriodUtils namespace

namespaces.name: JSONUtils
namespaces.description: Utility namespace for JSON operations with MoneyWorks type awareness. Handles parsing and stringification with automatic type conversions.

examples.title: Using JSONUtils namespace

constants.name: DATE_FIELDS
constants.description: Standard MoneyWorks field names that contain dates. Used for automatic date conversion during JSON parsing.
constants.value: Set containing: transDate, enterDate, modDate, dueDate, startDate, endDate, date, paymentDate, reconcileDate, statementDate, importDate, exportDate, createdDate, closedDate

constants.name: PERIOD_FIELDS
constants.description: Standard MoneyWorks field names that contain periods. Used for automatic period conversion during JSON parsing.
constants.value: Set containing: period, startPeriod, endPeriod, closePeriod, currentPeriod

constants.name: TIME_FIELDS
constants.description: Standard MoneyWorks field names that contain times. Used for automatic time conversion during JSON parsing.
constants.value: Set containing: transTime, enterTime, modTime, startTime, endTime, time

constants.name: YYYYMMDD_REGEX
constants.description: Regular expression for validating YYYYMMDD format.

constants.name: PERIOD_REGEX
constants.description: Regular expression for validating Period format (YYYYMM as number).
